inputs.name: pipeline_length_km
inputs.notes: NSTA LENGTH_M converted to km in the ranked candidate file

inputs.name: inner_diameter_in
inputs.notes: NSTA internal diameter converted from mm to inches

inputs.name: inlet_pressure_psia
inputs.notes: NSTA max operating pressure in barg converted to approximate psia

inputs.name: outlet_pressure_psia
inputs.notes: Default outlet pressure; clipped to 80 percent of inlet if needed

inputs.name: transport_temperature_c
inputs.notes: Default CO2 transport temperature used until project-specific temperature is known

inputs.name: molecular_weight_co2_g_per_mol
inputs.notes: Molecular weight of pure CO2

inputs.name: compressibility_factor_z
inputs.notes: Goldeneye benchmark value reused for first NSTA screening until properties module is added

inputs.name: viscosity_micro_pa_s
inputs.notes: Goldeneye benchmark value reused for first NSTA screening until properties module is added

inputs.name: fanning_friction_factor
inputs.notes: Simple default friction factor for early screening only

inputs.name: required_project_flow_mtpa
inputs.notes: Default target flow for early CCS screening

assumptions.name: capacity_factor
assumptions.notes: Used to convert annual project flow into design flow

warnings.message: CO2 properties are currently supplied by the benchmark assumptions; CoolProp/REFPROP validation is still required.

trace.name: capacity
trace.formula: sqrt((pi^2 * D^5 * MW * (P_in^2 - P_out^2)) / (64 * f * Z * R * T * L))
trace.notes: This reproduces the dissertation/poster equation form.

inputs.name: future_co2_corrosion_rate_mm_per_year
inputs.notes: Simple future CO2 corrosion placeholder for first screening only

inputs.name: future_co2_corrosion_rate_low_mm_per_year
inputs.notes: Optimistic dry-CO2 corrosion sensitivity for batch screening

inputs.name: future_co2_corrosion_rate_high_mm_per_year
inputs.notes: Conservative dry-CO2 corrosion sensitivity for batch screening

inputs.name: co2_water_content_ppmv
inputs.notes: Placeholder dry CO2 water content for corrosion screening

inputs.name: co2_water_spec_limit_ppmv
inputs.notes: Placeholder water specification limit for corrosion screening

inputs.name: water_dew_point_margin_c
inputs.notes: Assumed positive margin to water dew point for dry-CO2 screening

outputs.name: corrosion_basis
outputs.value: The high corrosion-rate case is material for remaining-life sensitivity.

assumptions.name: future_co2_corrosion_rate_mm_per_year
assumptions.notes: Simple future CO2 corrosion placeholder for first screening only

assumptions.name: future_co2_corrosion_rate_low_mm_per_year
assumptions.notes: Optimistic dry-CO2 corrosion sensitivity for batch screening

assumptions.name: future_co2_corrosion_rate_high_mm_per_year
assumptions.notes: Conservative dry-CO2 corrosion sensitivity for batch screening

assumptions.name: co2_water_content_ppmv
assumptions.notes: Placeholder dry CO2 water content for corrosion screening

assumptions.name: co2_water_spec_limit_ppmv
assumptions.notes: Placeholder water specification limit for corrosion screening

assumptions.name: water_dew_point_margin_c
assumptions.notes: Assumed positive margin to water dew point for dry-CO2 screening

warnings.message: Corrosion model is a screening dry-CO2 risk check. A final model needs stream composition, water specification, operating envelope, inspection evidence, and specialist review.

trace.name: corrosion_rate_range
trace.formula: low/base/high corrosion rates are read from scenario assumptions

trace.name: dry_co2_risk
trace.formula: high if water content exceeds limit or dew point margin is negative; medium if water evidence is missing or high corrosion rate is material; otherwise low
trace.notes: Screening rule, not a detailed corrosion prediction model.

inputs.name: nominal_wall_thickness_mm
inputs.notes: NSTA wall thickness

inputs.name: minimum_wall_thickness_mm
inputs.notes: Approximate t = P * OD / (2 * SMYS * design factor); screening only

inputs.name: future_co2_corrosion_rate_mm_per_year
inputs.notes: Simple future CO2 corrosion placeholder for first screening only

inputs.name: historical_corrosion_rate_mm_per_year
inputs.notes: Simple historical corrosion placeholder for first screening only

inputs.name: historical_corrosion_years
inputs.notes: Assessment year minus NSTA start year, or fallback if start date is missing

inputs.name: nominal_wall_thickness_uncertainty_fraction
inputs.notes: Wall thickness uncertainty range for NSTA records before inspection evidence is available

inputs.name: minimum_wall_thickness_uncertainty_fraction
inputs.notes: Minimum wall uncertainty range for screening until design-code basis is verified

inputs.name: historical_wall_loss_uncertainty_fraction
inputs.notes: Historical wall loss uncertainty range for screening

inputs.name: future_co2_corrosion_rate_low_mm_per_year
inputs.notes: Optimistic dry-CO2 corrosion sensitivity for batch screening

inputs.name: future_co2_corrosion_rate_high_mm_per_year
inputs.notes: Conservative dry-CO2 corrosion sensitivity for batch screening

outputs.name: historical_wall_loss_mm
outputs.notes: Calculated from historical corrosion rate and historical years.

assumptions.name: future_co2_corrosion_rate_mm_per_year
assumptions.notes: Simple future CO2 corrosion placeholder for first screening only

assumptions.name: nominal_wall_thickness_uncertainty_fraction
assumptions.notes: Wall thickness uncertainty range for NSTA records before inspection evidence is available

assumptions.name: minimum_wall_thickness_uncertainty_fraction
assumptions.notes: Minimum wall uncertainty range for screening until design-code basis is verified

assumptions.name: historical_wall_loss_uncertainty_fraction
assumptions.notes: Historical wall loss uncertainty range for screening

warnings.message: Integrity result is a screening estimate only; inspection records, material grade checks, defects, and requalification are still needed.
Available wall thickness is zero or negative.

trace.name: historical_wall_loss
trace.formula: reported_historical_wall_loss_mm, if available; otherwise historical_corrosion_rate_mm_per_year * historical_corrosion_years

trace.name: remaining_life_uncertainty
trace.formula: conservative life = low wall / high corrosion; optimistic life = high wall / low corrosion
trace.notes: Screening uncertainty band for limited or conflicting wall evidence.

inputs.name: cost_material_usd_2025
inputs.notes: Reference cost component scaled by length for NSTA screening; scaled by NSTA length/reference length only (scale factor 3.983)

inputs.name: cost_labor_usd_2025
inputs.notes: Reference cost component scaled by length for NSTA screening; scaled by NSTA length/reference length only (scale factor 3.983)

inputs.name: cost_row_damages_usd_2025
inputs.notes: Reference cost component scaled by length for NSTA screening; scaled by NSTA length/reference length only (scale factor 3.983)

inputs.name: cost_misc_usd_2025
inputs.notes: Reference cost component scaled by length for NSTA screening; scaled by NSTA length/reference length only (scale factor 3.983)

inputs.name: cost_surge_tank_usd_2025
inputs.notes: Reference cost component scaled by length for NSTA screening; scaled by NSTA length/reference length only (scale factor 3.983)

inputs.name: cost_control_system_usd_2025
inputs.notes: Reference cost component scaled by length for NSTA screening; scaled by NSTA length/reference length only (scale factor 3.983)

inputs.name: cost_booster_station_usd_2025
inputs.notes: No booster station assumed in the first screening default; scaled by NSTA length/reference length only (scale factor 3.983)

inputs.name: contingency_fraction
inputs.notes: Project contingency factor

warnings.message: No NETL CO2_T_COM reference total is supplied for this scenario, so cost is internally checked but not externally validated.

trace.name: cost_subtotal
trace.formula: sum(material, labor, ROW damages, misc, surge tank, control system, booster station)

trace.name: netl_cost_comparison
trace.notes: Runs only when a like-for-like NETL CO2_T_COM reference is supplied.

outputs.name: pre_lca_reason_summary
outputs.value: Do not move to LCA until failed technical or cost checks are resolved.

outputs.name: pre_lca_reasons
outputs.value: One or more upstream modules failed: integrity.

outputs.name: pre_lca_next_data
outputs.value: verify wall thickness and inspection records; check pipe grade, design factor, defects, and pressure basis; replace simple Barlow screening with a proper requalification method

trace.name: pre_lca_gate
trace.formula: fail if any upstream module fails; insufficient_data if key outputs are missing; marginal if outputs pass but key assumptions or validation warnings remain; otherwise pass
trace.notes: This is a screening gate, not an engineering approval decision.

inputs.name: pipeline_length_km
inputs.notes: NSTA LENGTH_M converted to km in the ranked candidate file

inputs.name: outer_diameter_in
inputs.notes: Estimated as internal diameter plus two times wall thickness

inputs.name: inner_diameter_in
inputs.notes: NSTA internal diameter converted from mm to inches

inputs.name: steel_density_kg_per_m3
inputs.notes: Carbon steel density used for first LCA inventory calculation

inputs.name: lca_refurbishment_steel_fraction
inputs.notes: Assume refurbishment steel equals 5 percent of new-build pipe steel for first screening

inputs.name: lca_pipeline_steel_factor_kgco2e_per_kg
inputs.notes: Open placeholder factor for first LCA proxy; replace with ecoinvent/Brightway result

inputs.name: lca_new_build_construction_factor_kgco2e_per_km
inputs.notes: Open placeholder offshore construction factor for first LCA proxy; replace with ecoinvent/Brightway result

inputs.name: lca_refurbishment_activity_factor_kgco2e_per_km
inputs.notes: Open placeholder refurbishment activity factor for first LCA proxy; replace with project-specific data

assumptions.name: lca_refurbishment_steel_fraction
assumptions.notes: Assume refurbishment steel equals 5 percent of new-build pipe steel for first screening

assumptions.name: lca_pipeline_steel_factor_kgco2e_per_kg
assumptions.notes: Open placeholder factor for first LCA proxy; replace with ecoinvent/Brightway result

assumptions.name: lca_new_build_construction_factor_kgco2e_per_km
assumptions.notes: Open placeholder offshore construction factor for first LCA proxy; replace with ecoinvent/Brightway result

assumptions.name: lca_refurbishment_activity_factor_kgco2e_per_km
assumptions.notes: Open placeholder refurbishment activity factor for first LCA proxy; replace with project-specific data

warnings.message: LCA result is a screening proxy only. It uses open factors from the assumption file, not final ecoinvent impact results.
Pre-LCA gate did not pass, so LCA must be read as sensitivity only.

trace.name: lca_proxy
trace.formula: new-build proxy = steel mass * steel factor + length * construction factor; reuse proxy = refurbishment steel * steel factor + length * refurbishment factor
trace.notes: Screening proxy to be replaced by Brightway/openLCA ecoinvent calculation.

nsta_candidate.UPD_REAS: CRS Code and CRS Name didn't correspond
